name: QAT & EMA Negative Results on SOTA Stack
blurb: Non-record: Documents that adding QAT (STE) and EMA to PR #180 SOTA stack hurts performance. QAT costs 8% throughput, EMA costs 32%. Smaller artifact from QAT (15.69 vs 15.99 MB) but net negative BPB. Baseline reproduction: 1.1426.
author: Felipe Vidal
